action.reasoning: Observation: ~8.6 minutes and 7 iterations remain. Best-ever eval is rmse_z500=1018.63 (iter 5). Recent single-model evals without TTA (run_epoch5, best.pt, best_retrained) score 1032-1060. We have 5 epoch checkpoints (run_epoch1-5.pt) from the same training run but never evaluated them as a prediction ensemble. Analysis: Snapshot ensembling (averaging predictions across multiple training epochs) often improves generalization over any single epoch by combining different bias-variance trade-offs. It requires no additional training and inference on 5 models with batch_size=64 should finish well within time limits. Decision: Combine run_epoch1-5.pt into a single ensemble checkpoint, update predict.py to automatically ensemble all sub-models present, perform a local dry-run, and immediately submit for evaluation.
action.command: python combine.py && python predict.py --data_path temp_test --checkpoint checkpoints/epoch_ensemble.pt --output temp_test/out_epoch_ensemble.json && echo 'DRY RUN OK'
